content.en:
"So many forbidden zerg!"

Ye Tian was also surprised.

There are far fewer taboo Zerg than the previous intelligence said!

There are only sixty or seventy forbidden zergs according to intelligence, but there are more than a hundred forbidden zergs here, and there are many sevenfold heaven forbidden zergs.

At this moment, Ye Tian also noticed Qinghe Dao Ancestor and them, and seeing that their condition was very critical, he quickly flew over.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian came to Qinghe Dao Ancestor and them.

Bang!!!

The forbidden realm unfolded, completely suppressing these taboo zergs.

Immediately, Ye Tian condensed the forbidden spear and blessed the forbidden talent: the dark spear!

Burst!

The forbidden spear instantly pierced the body of a sevenfold heaven forbidden zerg, and its residual power continued unabated, piercing the bodies of several sixfold heaven forbidden zergs.

Those Sixfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg were directly killed by the Forbidden Spear in seconds, and although the Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg did not die, they were also seriously injured and dying, and they had almost no resistance power.

Now.

Qinghe Dao Ancestor, Silver Clothed Dao Ancestor, and Crazy Shark Dao Ancestor were all dumbfounded, although it was also shocking to kill the Sixfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg with one blow, it was not too exaggerated, but it was too exaggerated to hit and almost kill a Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg with one blow.

Several of them have been fighting with the Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg for so long, and they haven't given them much damage, judging from the degree of life-saving, the life-saving ability of a Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg is even stronger than them.

And Ye Tian almost killed a Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg with one blow, which meant that Ye Tian could also hit them hard and even kill them with one blow!

"Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor can't hit me hard with one blow!"

Qinghe Dao Ancestor and the three of them muttered inwardly.

Doesn't this mean that Ye Tian's combat power has surpassed that of the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, and it is not a little more, but a lot.

Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor They are already the ultimate level of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and only the Ghost Son can suppress the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor and them, but even the Ghost Son does not necessarily have the power to hit them hard with a blow or even kill them.

Terrifying!

This is what they say about Ye Tian!

After Ye Tian hit the Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg with one blow, he continued to stab a spear and directly killed it.

At this time, the other forbidden zergs seemed to realize Ye Tian's terribleness, but they did not flee, but besieged them all together.

In their consciousness, there is no such thing as fear.

Ye Tian used the Ten Directions Void Fixing Technique to seal the void, and then used the Ancient Desolate Body to increase the combat power.

"Ancient Slashing Technique!"

This blow directly cut the body of a Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg apart, and then used the Forbidden Spear to bless the Forbidden Talent Dark Spear and kill it with a single blow.

That's it.

Ye Tian performed a doorway technique and killed one Forbidden Zerg after another, and after a while, there were a number of Forbidden Zerg corpses lying in this dark forbidden void.

Qinghe Dao Ancestor, Silver Coat Dao Ancestor, and Crazy Shark Dao Ancestor stood there and watched, and there was no need to go up to help at all.

It didn't take long for only seven or eight of this Forbidden Zerg to remain, including the three-headed Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg.

At this time, they were also frightened and began to run away.

However, they can't escape at all, Ye Tian's speed is much faster than them, and there is also a tracking type of Great Thousand Dao Technique-Sanguo Tianmu Technique, which can easily lock their location, plus they can't hide their bodies at all, even if they escape far away, they will be chased and killed by Ye Tian one by one.

It didn't take long for these last few forbidden zergs to be killed by Ye Tian one by one.

------------------

"Thank you Wanfa Dao Ancestor for saving your life!"

Qinghe Dao Ancestor, Silver Cloth Dao Ancestor, and Crazy Shark Dao Ancestor saw that Ye Tian had killed the forbidden Zerg and said gratefully.

"You also have a great merit, if you hadn't dragged this group of forbidden zergs, I wouldn't have been able to kill them!" Ye Tian said with a smile: "Let's take out the corpses of those fallen Dao ancestors from the space in the forbidden zerg's body!"

"Hmm!"

Qinghe Daozu and the three nodded.

After some tidying, a corpse of Dao Ancestor was taken out of the space inside the Forbidden Zerg, and these Dao Ancestor corpses needed to be taken back for burial or burned, and should not be left for the Forbidden Zerg.

"These Zerg corpses are your next, and they will belong to you, I'll take the rest away, no problem, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"No problem!"

Qinghe Daozu and the three agreed.

Whoever kills the forbidden zerg will belong to whomever this is a rule between the major forces, and they naturally will not oppose it.

Besides, they and Ye Tian are not Dao Ancestors of the same force, and there is no need for people to take care of him.

If it weren't for the major forces uniting this time, they might be enemies in peacetime!

Thereupon.

Ye Tian took away the corpse of the forbidden Zerg he had killed, and returned to their respective bases with Qinghe Dao Ancestor.

The corpses of the Dao Ancestors were brought back to the base by Ye Tian for disposal.

Black Wind Mountain Base.

Ye Tian came back and handed over the task, and the Wind King returned the corpses of Dao Ancestors to them according to their respective forces, and a few of the corpses that were scattered were brought back to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to be destroyed.

In the following days, Ye Tian occasionally went to hunt the Forbidden Zerg and occasionally supported other Dao Ancestors.

Before he knew it, a hundred years had passed, and he had accumulated nearly 1,000 corpses of the Forbidden Zerg.

this day.

Ye Tian applied to return to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm for a period of repair, and at the same time to sacrifice the corpses of those forbidden zergs.

Soon, the application was approved.

......

Xuanxu Proterozoic Realm.

Ye Tian and Xiao Yue came back, and their son Ye Xingchen continued to fight and did not come back.

As soon as they returned to the human race, Ye Tian and his wife Xiao Yue began to sacrifice those forbidden Zerg corpses.

On the sacrificial array.

A taboo Zerg corpse was placed on it, and as the large array moved, these taboo Zerg corpses were sacrificed.

The next moment.

Ye Tian felt the existence of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm Origin, and the other party gave him the blessing of cultivation, and a large amount of Xuanxu Ancient Realm Origin poured into his body, refining his physical body, forbidden Dao power, and soul.

Ye Tian preserved these origin powers and waited for them to be slowly refined in the future.

Once he refines all these origin powers, his strength will still be improved to a certain extent.

What's more, under the increase of the origin of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, if he cultivates in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm in the future, his cultivation speed will far exceed before, which is the real great benefit.

After that, Ye Tian entered the Forbidden Void Realm to cultivate for a period of time, and then left the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and entered the Dark Forbidden Realm again to hunt the Forbidden Zerg.

In this way, coming and going, Ye Tian's strength and reputation continued to grow.

this day.

A piece of news came that an invincible Dao Ancestor had fallen!
